description: Display text with optional formatting tags, database binding, game HUD binding, and navigation actions

text.description: Text content. Supports inline formatting tags: [b]bold[/b], [i]italic[/i], [u]underline[/u], [s]strikethrough[/s], [sup]superscript[/sup], [sub]subscript[/sub]. Supports {{fieldName}} template variables when inside a DataRepeater.

linkUrl.description: Makes the text a hyperlink. Set href here.

action.description: Click action (same as Button). Use 'screen' to navigate when clicked.

width.description: Width in px or 'auto'. Prefer sizing.widthMode instead.

bindTo.description: GAME HUD BINDING. Binds this text to a live game value. Only available in game-mode screens (kind='world'). Put {value} placeholder in 'text' prop. e.g. text='SCORE: {value}', bindTo='score'

dataField.description: DB field to display as text

requireLogin.description: If true, hides content until user is authenticated

notes: Use {{fieldName}} inside 'text' when the Text is a child of DataRepeater — it will be replaced with the record's field value.
bindTo is only for game screens. The 'text' prop should include {value} as placeholder: 'SCORE: {value}'.
For large bold headings use fontSize 20-32, alignment='center'.

examples.description: DB-bound label inside DataRepeater (shows post title)
